translations.en: As you kneel before the altar, a mystical voice sounds in your head.
translations.zh: 當你跪在祭壇前，一個神秘的聲音在你腦中迴響。

translations.en: "Thou hast much to learn about valor."
translations.zh: 「汝對勇敢仍有許多須學習之處。」
「汝之行為展現了令人欽佩的英勇。」

translations.en: "Thy deeds serve as an example to all."
Do you wish to meditate at this altar?
translations.zh: 你希望在此祭壇冥想嗎？
translations.note: 旁白提示，尾隨空格保留

translations.en: "Tender-handed stroke a nettle, and it stings you for your pains."
translations.zh: 「以柔手撫弄蕁麻，它以刺痛回報你的代價。」
translations.note: 聖言（Aaron Hill 詩作典故）

translations.en: "Grasp it as a man of mettle, and it soft as silk remains."
translations.zh: 「以剛毅之手緊握，它便柔如絲綢。」

translations.en: "There is naught else for you to learn here and now."
"Return when thy journey has progressed further."
translations.zh: 「待汝的旅程更進一步，再行回返。」

translator_notes: 英勇神殿，真言 ra（不翻譯）。冥想獲得力量提升。聖言引自 Aaron Hill 的蕁麻詩，以剛克柔的比喻。
